channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Panthers sign Colin Granger, ex-college basketball center, in attempt to make him tight end
item.description: Colin Granger, an ex-college basketball center, has signed with the Carolina Panthers, who will attempt to convert him into an NFL-caliber tight end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fencer Stephanie Turner receives honor for courage after refusal to compete against trans athlete
item.description: Female fencer Stephanie Turner received an award from XX-XY Athletics for the courage she showed when protesting against a transgender athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr, Blue Jays agree to massive 14-year contract extension: reports
item.description: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. and the Toronto Blue Jays reportedly agreed to a massive 14-year contract extension worth up to $500 million early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's college basketball looking for next star with no Paige Bueckers and JuJu Watkins injured
item.description: Women’s college basketball has been on the rise these last few years, riding the wave of iconic players like Caitlin Clark, Angel Reese, Paige Bueckers and JuJu Watkins.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Women's NCAA Final Four tournament a 'slam dunk for Tampa's economy
item.description: Even though the women’s championship is over, Tampa businesses are calling this weekend a "slam dunk." This is the fourth time the city has hosted the NCAA women’s basketball Final Four, and it’s not just basketball fans who are winning.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Coby White scores 37, Josh Giddey adds 23 as Bulls beat Hornets 131-117 for 3rd straight win
item.description: Coby White scored 37 points, shooting 6 of 8 from 3-point range, Josh Giddey added 23 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls rolled past the Charlotte Hornets 131-117 on Sunday for their third straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Pirates draw heat for removing Roberto Clemente tribute in right field
item.description: The Pittsburgh Pirates caused a rift in the fan base over the weekend as the team appeared to remove a tribute to baseball legend Roberto Clemente.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts winless champs LA Galaxy in crucial western showdown
item.description: Real Salt Lake (2-4-0, T-11th place Western Conference) returns home Saturday afternoon when they host reigning MLS Cup Champions LA Galaxy at America First Field. RSL is coming off a road loss on Saturday night and hope to get their season back on track against a struggling LA side.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA, 85-51, in Final Four as Paige Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, WGN 9

item.title: BYU guard Dallin Hall enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU point guard announced on Wednesday that he is entering the transfer portal after three seasons with the Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Houston blows past the Jazz, 143-105
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The end of the season can't come soon enough for the Utah Jazz. Jalen Green scored 22 points, while Alperen Sengun was one assist away from a triple-double, as the Houston Rockets crushed the Jazz Wednesday night, 143-105.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry hits 12 3-pointers, scores 52 as Warriors defeat Grizzlies 134-125
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had 52 points, including 12 3-pointers, as the Golden State Warriors held on for a 134-125 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Carson Kelly becomes 1st Cubs player to hit for the cycle in 32 years in 18-3 rout of A's in West Sacramento
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Carson Kelly had come close to hitting for the cycle, yet that elusive triple kept holding him back. He had just two triples over a 10-year big league career before Monday night. That's when Kelly became the first Cubs player in 32 years to hit for the cycle.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, WGN 9
